title: Column that counts days since an update comment was left
excerpt:

posts.author: SLyttle (Sam Lyttle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have found a column called “Last Updated” that has a day counter which resets when an update is made to a status column on an individual row which is excellent, but on my board we use the “chat” symbol on the first column to write what the latest information is, so I am wondering if there is another function or a setting I can change that resets this counter but based on when an update comment was last left?

I have attached a picture if my explanation is not clear.

Thank you in advance.

Update Column1113×493 49.6 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about this?

image576×293 10.2 KB

posts.author: SLyttle (Sam Lyttle)
posts.cookedHtml: That is exactly what I needed, thank you so much!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad it worked, have a great week!
